name: swarm-wave
description: Parallel swarm across 3 P1 epics: str-fpgb (protocol drift), str-28vd (process guardrails), str-3ky9 (mocking wave 2)

members.name: record-mode
members.prompt:
You are a teammate on the swarm-wave team. Your task is:

**Task #8: [str-3ky9.11] Recording mode (--record)** (P2, feature)

Add --record CLI flag for intentional recording sessions. Runs against full integration stack, records all external call inputs/outputs, builds ExternalDepBehavior maps, saves to .shatter/recorded-mocks/ as fixtures for future autonomous runs.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- CLI --record flag works
- External call I/O recorded
- Behavior maps saved
- Recorded data usable as seeds in future runs

**Workflow:**
1. Mark task #8 as in_progress with TaskUpdate
2. `bd start str-3ky9.11` to create branch
3. Research existing mock infrastructure: look at ExternalDepBehavior, MockValueSpace, mock generation in shatter-core and shatter-ts
4. Also check how --record relates to str-3ky9.10 (MockValueSpace enum and live-first logic) which is already done
5. Implement the --record flag in shatter-cli
6. Add recording logic to capture external call I/O during execution
7. Serialize recorded mocks to .shatter/recorded-mocks/
8. Add tests
9. Run cargo test and cargo clippy
10. Commit, mark task #8 as completed
11. Send a message to team-lead with results

members.name: mock-parity
members.prompt:
You are a teammate on the swarm-wave team. You have three tasks:

**Task #9: [str-3ky9.15] Refactoring recs for hard-to-mock deps** (P3)
Detect hard-to-mock calls (dynamic dispatch, closures, subprocess spawning, multi-layer indirection). Produce refactoring recommendations in scan output.

**Task #10: [str-3ky9.16] Go frontend mock parity** (P3)
Extend Go generateMockFile for per-execution mock variation, ThrowError support (panic or error return), discovered_dependencies reporting, and custom generator integration. E2E test with Go function and dynamic mocks.

**Task #11: [str-3ky9.17] strace-based dep discovery tool** (P3)
Add `shatter discover-deps --strace` command using strace to catalog network syscalls. One-shot diagnostic, Linux only.

**Workflow:**
1. Start with task #10 (Go mock parity) as it has the clearest scope
   - `bd start str-3ky9.16` to create branch
   - Research existing Go mock generation in shatter-go/instrument/
   - Look at how TS frontend handles per-execution mocks, ThrowError, discovered_dependencies
   - Implement parity in Go frontend
   - Add E2E test
   - Run `cd shatter-go && go test ./...` and `go vet ./...`
   - Commit, mark task #10 as completed
2. Then task #9 (refactoring recs) on branch str-3ky9.15
3. Then task #11 (strace discovery) on branch str-3ky9.17
4. Send a message to team-lead with results after each task

Note: Separate issues, separate branches.
